productDisplayName: Nike Men Silver and Black Sports Shoes
description: Style NoteWith plush cushioning and a supportive Fit, the nike 2.04 running shoe is perfect for those who love healthy runs. Lightweight and comfortable, this shoe also doubles up as a great everyday wear for those who enjoy long walks.Product DetailsMesh upper for enhanced ventilationStrategically placed synthetic overlays for added shoe structure and durabilityMeshed and padded tongue and sockliner for all-day comfortGilly lacing system for a supportive fit and to lock the foot in placeDual-density phylon midsole for a unique blend of lightweight cushioning and enhanced impact protectionCushioned fabric footbed for all-day comfortTPR outsole with multi-directional lugs on the forefoot for optimal traction on various surfacesForefoot flex grooves for a more natural range of motionDecoupled heel with a mid-heel scoop for enhanced grip and traction, and enhanced impact protection to the backfoot and anklesArched midfoot for inner arch supportWarranty for manufacturing defects: 6 months (not valid on products with more than 20% discount)Material and CareSynthetic, meshWipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
